mapper.sql: id, plan_id, feature_code, feature_name, feature_group, feature_type, quota_limit, enabled, status, sort_no, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from sys_plan_feature
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from sys_plan_feature
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_plan_feature (id, plan_id, feature_code, feature_name, feature_group, feature_type, quota_limit, enabled, status, sort_no, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, config_schema) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{featureCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{featureName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{featureGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{featureType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quotaLimit,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{configSchema,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into sys_plan_feature
id,
plan_id,
feature_code,
feature_name,
feature_group,
feature_type,
quota_limit,
enabled,
status,
sort_no,
version,
delete_marker,
create_by,
create_time,
update_by,
update_time,
config_schema,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{featureCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{featureName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{featureGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{featureType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{quotaLimit,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{enabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{configSchema,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update sys_plan_feature
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
plan_id = #{row.planId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
feature_code = #{row.featureCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
feature_name = #{row.featureName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
feature_group = #{row.featureGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
feature_type = #{row.featureType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quota_limit = #{row.quotaLimit,jdbcType=BIGINT},
enabled = #{row.enabled,jdbcType=BIT},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort_no = #{row.sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
config_schema = #{row.configSchema,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update sys_plan_feature set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_id = #{row.planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, feature_code = #{row.featureCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_name = #{row.featureName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_group = #{row.featureGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_type = #{row.featureType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quota_limit = #{row.quotaLimit,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled = #{row.enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_no = #{row.sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, config_schema = #{row.configSchema,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update sys_plan_feature set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_id = #{row.planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, feature_code = #{row.featureCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_name = #{row.featureName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_group = #{row.featureGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_type = #{row.featureType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quota_limit = #{row.quotaLimit,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled = #{row.enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_no = #{row.sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update sys_plan_feature
plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
feature_code = #{featureCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
feature_name = #{featureName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
feature_group = #{featureGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
feature_type = #{featureType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quota_limit = #{quotaLimit,jdbcType=BIGINT},
enabled = #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort_no = #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
config_schema = #{configSchema,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_plan_feature set plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, feature_code = #{featureCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_name = #{featureName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_group = #{featureGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_type = #{featureType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quota_limit = #{quotaLimit,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled = #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_no = #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, config_schema = #{configSchema,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_plan_feature set plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, feature_code = #{featureCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_name = #{featureName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_group = #{featureGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feature_type = #{featureType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quota_limit = #{quotaLimit,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled = #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_no = #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
